name: AirTAC International Group
summary: AirTAC International Group, through its subsidiaries, manufactures and supplies pneumatic equipment worldwide. The company offers standard, miniature, compact/ultracompact, multi-mounting, twin- and tri-rod, slide table, rodless, rotary table, twist clamp, clamp, unclamping, and stopper cylinders, as well as air grippers and accessories. It also provides solenoid, air, manual control, mechanical control and other, and fluid control valves; air preparation units, including F.R.L. combination, FR.L. combination, filter and regulator, filter, regulator, lubricator, soft star-up and safe on-off valve, air distribution block, drain, and pressure gauge units. In addition, the company offers accessories, such as shock absorbers, polyurethane tubings, fittings, silencers, and speed controllers; and standard digital pressure switches. Further, it provides HRBS blade swing cylinders, HFKP dust-proof pneumatic fingers, DSC cylinders, stainless mini cylinders, diaphragm cylinders; and proportional solenoid, 6D integrated, 6V400/600 solenoid, 2WA valves. Additionally, the company offers shut-off, slow open, assembled pressure regulator, quick drain, shuttle, and double pressure valves; DPH analog output digital display switches, DPS digital display air pressure switches, DPHF acid and alkali resistant digital display switches, DPSW/DPHW waterproof digital display switches, and strong magnetic sensors; standard linear guideway, LSD ball screws, dust-proof standard linear guideway, and LRW wide micro linear guideway; belt driven linear slider, screw slider, and linear module actuators; stepping and servo motors; and B60 clean products and air indicators. Its products are used in automotive, machinery manufacturing, metallurgy, electronics, environmental protection, lighting and textile, ceramics, medical equipment, food, and packaging automatic industrial fields. The company was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.
